summary: This is an intellectual property license agreement (in Spanish) between Fundación Kené Rao and PsyDAO Association for traditional Shipibo Konibo 'Kené' designs. The document grants exclusive rights to reproduce, distribute, and commercialize these ancestral designs worldwide. No scientific, experimental, or therapeutic development content is present.

content_blocks.title: Contract Header and Parties
content_blocks.content: License agreement dated December 16, 2024 between Fundación Kené Rao (Licensor) in Pucallpa, Peru and PsyDAO Association (Licensee) in Baar, Switzerland. Relates to traditional Kené designs from Shipibo Konibo indigenous people.

content_blocks.title: Article 1 - Rights Transfer
content_blocks.content: Licensor temporarily and exclusively transfers rights for digital reproduction, worldwide distribution, translation/adaptation, and other legal uses of the designs.

content_blocks.title: Article 2 - Payment Terms
content_blocks.content: Licensee pays 1000 PEN advance at signing plus 20% royalties on retail price of products using the designs. Royalties paid per sale or monthly.

content_blocks.title: Article 3-4 - Duration and Exclusivity
content_blocks.content: Contract has indefinite duration. License is exclusive - no other party including the Licensor can use the designs.

content_blocks.title: Article 5-8 - Additional Terms
content_blocks.content: Sublicensing requires written consent. Non-payment triggers contract resolution and damages. Governed by Peruvian law with Pucallpa courts as venue. Contact emails: keneraofund@gmail.com, licenses@psydao.com, jesse@molecule.to

content_blocks.title: Signatures
content_blocks.content: Signed by Fundación Kené Rao (with official stamp) and Jesse Hudson for PsyDAO Association.

content_blocks.title: Exhibit A - Kené Design Sample 1
content_blocks.content: Traditional textile pattern showing geometric designs in purple, pink, blue, and white horizontal bands with repeating diamond and linear motifs.

content_blocks.title: Exhibit A - Kené Design Sample 2
content_blocks.content: Traditional textile pattern in dark green with repeating geometric letter-like symbols in orange, red, yellow, and pink with decorative borders.

content_blocks.title: Exhibit A - Kené Design Sample 3
content_blocks.content: Traditional textile pattern showing geometric maze-like designs in blue, pink, and coral colors arranged in repeating diamond patterns.

content_blocks.title: Exhibit A - Kené Design Sample 4
content_blocks.content: Traditional textile pattern on black background showing dark green geometric interlocking designs with colorful (pink, orange) accents forming abstract organic shapes.

key_findings: This is purely a commercial licensing agreement for traditional artwork/designs
No therapeutic, scientific, or experimental content whatsoever
Document is entirely unrelated to biotechnology or TRL assessment
PsyDAO Association is the licensee seeking to commercialize indigenous Shipibo Konibo designs
No scientific team, research program, drug development, or health-related activities mentioned
